Annoucements.title: Announcements
Annoucements.text: Our Virtual Home includes the physical infrastructure and manpower for maintaining our comprehensive operation and improving online systems for optimal connection during Daily Kabbalah Lessons, social gatherings, holidays, and meals. It allows each friend full interaction in their language, both with their Ten and the World Kli from 72 countries.
Annoucements.donations: LET'S BE PARTNERS IN THE DISSEMINATION ENTERPRISE OF THE "BNEI BARUCH - KABBALAH LA'AM" ASSOCIATION
Annoucements.donationsQuote: "Only through the expansion of the wisdom of Kabbalah in the masses will we obtain complete redemption" (Rabbi Yehuda Ashlag, "Baal HaSulam").
